# LegacyGuard Compliance Checklist

**Purpose:** This checklist outlines the regulatory and legal requirements LegacyGuard must meet to ensure secure, trustworthy, and compliant operation. It serves as a living document to track compliance status and identify areas for ongoing development and review.

**Disclaimer:** This checklist provides a high-level overview and should not be considered exhaustive legal advice. LegacyGuard must engage qualified legal counsel specialized in relevant jurisdictions (crypto, estate, data privacy, consumer protection) to ensure full compliance.
